properties.remark: 1 inch diameter limbs broken off and 1.63 inches of rain reported with a thunderstorm on Monday evening. Station Elevation: 4500 ft.
Public reported 1.00 inch (quarter size) hail at Emigrant Lake.
Large tree was uprooted. Tree had very shallow roots. Tree fell on a fence and a car, but missed the house by around 18 inches.
Medium Tree uprooted and fell into the road near a car. Car windshield was smashed, but no other damage visible. Tree had very shallow roots.
Several unhealthy trees and limbs fell or were uprooted along the road.

A tree fell on a fence and associated power line over the alley. Unknown the health of the tree, due to not seeing the roots. but it was around 6 to 8 inches across. In addition, there was an inflatable pool (est 6ft x 3 ft) blown into a tree in this area--unknown if it was filled when blown into tree.
Wind snapped a wooden street sign over. Sign post is a 4x4.
An unhealthy tree fell over onto a fence. Tree was 2 feet in diameter, but appeared rotten on the inside.
13 110ft power poles and lines were snapped over. There was a car that had unfortunate timing and ran into one of the downed poles during the storm. Unknown the extent of injuries at this time.
Several wooden high voltage powerlines snapped and fell.
Tree limbs (6-8 inches in diameter) fell on car. It appears as if the car was parked, so unclear if any injuries occurred.
